revision.text:
{| class="wikitable" style="table-layout:fixed; width:100%; font-size:90%;" |+ [[12024 GE]] |- ! style="width:12%;" | {{v|t|e|template=Gaian_calendar}} ! colspan="14" | [[Gaian calendar]] |- ! style="width:12%;" | Days | style="width:3%;" | Mon || style="width:3%;" | Tue || style="width:3%;" | Wed || style="width:3%;" | Thu || style="width:3%;" | Fri || style="width:3%;" | Sat || style="width:3%; background:#ffd700;" | Sun | style="width:3%;" | Mon || style="width:3%;" | Tue || style="width:3%;" | Wed || style="width:3%;" | Thu || style="width:3%;" | Fri || style="width:3%;" | Sat || style="width:3%; background:#ffd700;" | Sun
|- ! rowspan="4" | [[Sagittarius]] | [[Sagittarius 1|1]] || [[Sagittarius 2|2]] || [[Sagittarius 3|3]] || [[Sagittarius 4|4]] || [[Sagittarius 5|5]] || [[Sagittarius 6|6]] || style="background:#ffd700;"| [[Sagittarius 7|7]] | [[Sagittarius 8|8]] || [[Sagittarius 9|9]] || [[Sagittarius 10|10]] || [[Sagittarius 11|11]] || [[Sagittarius 12|12]] || [[Sagittarius 13|13]] || style="background:#ffd700;"| [[Sagittarius 14|14]] |- | || || || [[January 1|1]]|| [[January 2|2]]|| [[January 3|3]]|| style="background:#ffd700;" | [[January 4|4]] | [[January 5|5]]|| [[January 6|6]]|| [[January 7|7]]|| [[January 8|8]]|| [[January 9|9]]|| [[January 10|10]]|| style="background:#ffd700;" | [[January 11|11]] |- | [[Sagittarius 15|15]] || [[Sagittarius 16|16]] || [[Sagittarius 17|17]] || [[Sagittarius 18|18]] || [[Sagittarius 19|19]] || [[Sagittarius 20|20]] || style="background:#ffd700;"| [[Sagittarius 21|21]] | [[Sagittarius 22|22]] || [[Sagittarius 23|23]] || [[Sagittarius 24|24]] || [[Sagittarius 25|25]] || [[Sagittarius 26|26]] || [[Sagittarius 27|27]] || style="background:#ffd700;"| [[Sagittarius 28|28]] |- | [[January 12|12]]|| [[January 13|13]]|| [[January 14|14]]|| [[January 15|15]]|| [[January 16|16]]|| [[January 17|17]]|| style="background:#ffd700;" | [[January 18|18]] | [[January 19|19]]|| [[January 20|20]]|| [[January 21|21]]|| [[January 22|22]]|| [[January 23|23]]|| [[January 24|24]]|| style="background:#ffd700;" | [[January 25|25]]
